initcondition.formula: "Vendor Type" IN ("Vendor Type1") AND "Custom Form" IN ("Entry Form1","Entry Form2")
"Vendor Type" IN ("Vendor Type1") AND "Custom Form" IN ("Entry Form1","Entry Form2")
"Vendor Type" IN ("Vendor Type1") AND "Custom Form" IN ("Entry Form1","Entry Form2")
"Vendor Type" IN ("Vendor Type1") AND "Custom Form" IN ("Entry Form1","Entry Form2")
"Vendor Type" IN ("Vendor Type1") AND "Custom Form" IN ("Entry Form1","Entry Form2")
"Vendor Type" IN ("Vendor Type1") AND "Custom Form" IN ("Entry Form1","Entry Form2")
"Vendor Type" IN ("Vendor Type1") AND "Custom Form" IN ("Entry Form1","Entry Form2")
"Vendor Type" IN ("Vendor Type1") AND "Custom Form" IN ("Entry Form1","Entry Form2")
"Action" IN ("Create/Update1") AND "Custom Form" IN ("Entry Form1","Entry Form2")
"Action" IN ("Create/Update1") AND ( "Custom Form" IN ("Entry Form1") OR "Workflow:Type" = 'Employee' )
"Vendor Type" IN ("Vendor Type1") AND "Custom Form" IN ("Entry Form1","Entry Form2")
"Vendor Type" IN ("Vendor Type1") AND "Custom Form" IN ("Entry Form1","Entry Form2")
"Action" IN ("Create/Update1") AND "Custom Form" IN ("Entry Form1","Entry Form2")
